content.text:
I'll help you get warmed up by exploring the current workspace and understanding what we're working with. Let me start by examining the directory structure.</think><tool_call>Bash__()
command> ls -la /workspace
 kutje_> <tool_call>Bash__()
command> find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20
</arg_value>
